commands.repair_reason: This PR is useful but needs contributor real behavior proof and a narrow timeout fix before normal maintainer review can proceed; automation should not be queued while the external proof gate is missing.; Needs attention: The diff introduces keychain-backed secret resolution with no token leak found, but the unbounded helper process is a concrete auth-path availability concern.; Review finding: [P2] Bound the keycha... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a macOS GatewayEndpointStore SecretInputResolver to resolve local gateway.auth token/password SecretRef dictionaries from the keychain and adds Swift tests for helper and localConfig paths.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. Current main casts local gateway.auth.token/password as strings while the browser proxy consumes GatewayEndpointStore.localConfig(), so a SecretRef dictionary resolves to nil on that path.
commands.review_followup: This PR is useful but needs contributor real behavior proof and a narrow timeout fix before normal maintainer review can proceed; automation should not be queued while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix: resolve SecretRef keychain tokens in desktop app browser proxy
target.author: shad0wca7
